properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7 v8 v3 v4 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Do you feel Him in your heartbeat Even when you're running? You try to drown Him out With your life but you still hear Him calling

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With a voice you never heard But it sounds like home (home) You try to shut it out But you feel it in your bones And won't leave you alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His love isn't escapable His presence isn't shakable Right now you don't believe it's true A better day is coming

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And you don't need another place to hide He'll find you in your darkest night His love is holding on to you Even when you're running Even when you're running

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As a kid you said your prayers Now they're bouncing off the ceiling But took your world away When you trusted Him for healing

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He's no stranger to your heartbreak He knows how it feels to lose From the garden to the cross He's been chasing after you He's chasing after you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Your fear isn't dark enough Your pit isn't deep enough Your lie isn't loud enough To keep Him away from you

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The Father made the way for you The Son killed the grave for you Let the spirit come alive in you Are you tired of the running?

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: It's time to stop running now You don't have to have it figured out All you need to do is turn around And the Father will come running
